## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] I tested the relevant pages locally (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] If this touches content/queue paths, I re-ran `npm run seed:blob`
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env.local` contents in the diff
